name: Vinyl Storage Solution Wood/Brass - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Display your vinyl collection in a style with the Vinyl Storage Solution from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This vinyl storage is designed in a rectangular shape with multiple bars to help provide enough space for your vinyl. Designed with a wooden base, it features metal bars to help keep items separate and contained. Plus, the extended handles make it easy to move.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
